headline: WGS, Zevra Partner to Launch Genetic Testing for Niemann-Pick Type C
summary: GeneDx launches Zevra-backed testing program to expand ExomeDx access for Niemann-Pick Type C, aiming to speed diagnosis and add data to its Infinity dataset.

headline: Reasons to Add West Pharmaceutical Stock to Your Portfolio Right Now
summary: WST eyes growth from high-value components, GLP-1 drug demand and Annex 1 conversions, but generics destocking and European capacity constraints pose risks.

headline: SNN Launches ALLEVYN COMPLETE CARE Dressing for Wound Management

headline: Is Cardinal Health (CAH) Still Attractive After A 77% Yearly Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cardinal Health's share price still offers value after its strong run, this article will focus on what the numbers say about where the stock stands today. The stock last closed at US$217.04, with a 1 year return of 77.0% and a 3 year return of 223.8%. The 7 day and 30 day returns both sit at a 4.1% decline, and the year to date return is 5.5%. Recent market attention around Cardinal Health has centered on its role in the healthcare supply chain and how investors...
